criteria.reason: Fresh-review command reaches paid preflight before reservation or queue creation.
Reservation metadata includes the generated parsequeue id for worker settlement.
The enqueue path is parsequeue-only and releases the reservation on enqueue failure.
Queued and blocked Operator responses include the required billing/result metadata.
No external write, publication, or direct Operator Apify call was added.

commands_run: python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_operator_map_refresh.py tests/test_operator_fresh_reviews.py tests/test_operator_refresh_result.py tests/test_operator_apify_settlement.py
